title: 260. Klas Eklund säger vart skåpet ska stå
summary_md:
# 260. Klas Eklund säger vart skåpet ska stå

**Feed**: aktiepodden  
**Published**: 2026-05-01  
**Market Sentiment**: Mixed

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

A special macro-focused episode of Aktiepodden featuring economist Claes (Klas) Eklund, chief strategist at Dahlgren Capital, recorded during a central-bank-heavy week amid geopolitical tension. The discussion centres on the return of the state to economics, the green transition, AI as creative destruction, stablecoins/CBDCs, and demographics, with Eklund arguing Sweden is comparatively robust thanks to low public debt but warns 2026 growth will be lower and inflation higher than prior forecasts due to war-driven supply shocks. Almost no individual equities are discussed; the view is top-down and cautiously mixed.

---

## Universe Stocks

### ⛔ BTC — Bitcoin | **AVOID** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Negative | **Time Horizon**: LT  
**Confidence**: 70%

Guest economist Eklund: Bitcoin has no underlying value, purely psychology; contrasts it with stablecoins/tokenised payments which he sees as genuinely useful.

#### Reasoning

Eklund separates blockchain technology (which he finds very promising for faster, cheaper, transparent tokenised payments) from speculative applications like Bitcoin. He argues Bitcoin lacks any intrinsic value and is driven entirely by psychology, and elsewhere calls parts of the crypto market incomprehensibly overvalued. This is the guest's personal view, not the hosts'.

#### Sell Triggers

- if a credible underlying value or yield mechanism emerges
- if regulation gives it backing comparable to stablecoins

> *"Det finns inget underliggande värde i Bitcoin. Det är bara helt och hållet psykologi."*
